risks.title: Incomplete information security governance can leave responsibilities unclear.
risks.description: Incomplete information security governance can leave responsibilities unclear. Without effective ISO 27001 controls, the organization may fail to protect information assets or meet ISMS objectives.
risks.mitigation: Implement the mapped Annex A controls, assign an owner, collect evidence, and review residual risk.
